Top Stock Reports for Visa, TotalEnergies & AT&T
articles.summary: This article presents Zacks Research Daily's top stock reports for June 22, 2026, featuring detailed analyses of 16 major and micro-cap stocks. Key companies highlighted include Visa (V), TotalEnergies (TTE), and AT&T (T), with insights into their recent performance, financial outlooks, and challenges. The reports offer both positive and cautious views on these stocks based on current market conditions and company-specific factors.

articles.title: REGENXBIO Inc. Stock 12‑Month Price Target Raised to $26.08, Implies 234% Upside
articles.summary: The average 12-month price target for REGENXBIO Inc. (RGNX) stock has increased from $25.58 to $26.08, according to estimates from 12 analysts. This new target implies a potential upside of approximately 234% from its June 18 closing price. The consensus rating for RGNX remains a "Buy" from these analysts.

articles.title: AllianceBernstein stock hits 52-week low at 35.57 USD
Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Stock Could Be 82.8% Overvalued After AI Security Momentum
articles.summary: Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock is potentially 82.8% overvalued based on a fair value of $156.71 against a current price of $286.40, despite its strong performance and AI-focused security offerings. The company's market value is US$234.5 billion, and while it has seen significant share price appreciation, analysts question future upside. The narrative suggests the growth profile and valuation multiples are key factors in determining its true value, noting potential risks related to integration challenges of acquisitions or overly optimistic next-generation security growth.

articles.title: 3 US Financial Stocks With Rate Sensitivity And Fair Value Gaps
articles.summary: With the Federal Reserve maintaining a hawkish stance on interest rates, this article examines three U.S. financial stocks with rate sensitivity and potential fair value gaps: Fifth Third Bancorp, Pinnacle Financial Partners, and Citigroup. It evaluates how each company is positioned to either benefit or face challenges from a higher-for-longer rate environment, considering factors like P/E ratios, dividend yields, earnings growth, and recent operational changes. The analysis highlights both the opportunities and risks associated with these banks given their specific market positions and financial metrics.

articles.title: Form FWP GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC Filed by: GOLDMAN SACHS GROUP INC
articles.summary: This SEC filing (Form FWP) from Goldman Sachs Group Inc. details a Free Writing Prospectus for "Market Linked Securities — Auto-Callable with Leveraged Upside Participation, Contingent Absolute Return and Contingent Downside Principal at Risk Securities" due July 6, 2029. These securities are linked to the performance of Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) and Micron Technology, Inc. (MU) common stocks, with GS Finance Corp. as the issuer and Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. as the guarantor. The document outlines the terms, hypothetical payout profiles, and significant risks associated with this complex investment product, including the potential for loss of principal and various market and credit risks.

articles.title: ONEOK clear analyst consensus, shares trade firmly on NYSE
articles.summary: ONEOK (US6826801036) begins the week with a neutral Wall Street analyst consensus, reflecting its stable role as a high-yield US midstream company. Analysts estimate a 12-month price target in the mid-90-dollar range, with the stock currently trading in the high 80s per share. The company offers an estimated dividend yield just under 5 percent, and its mid-teen price-earnings ratio reflects both regulated cash flows and energy exposure.

articles.title: Enterprise Financial Services stock hits all-time high at 64.56 USD
articles.summary: Enterprise Financial Services (EFSC) stock has reached an all-time high of $64.56, reflecting positive market sentiment and robust financial health. The company's stock has seen significant gains over the past year and year-to-date, supported by 11 consecutive years of dividend increases and strong first-quarter 2026 earnings. Analysts, like Raymond James, have reaffirmed "outperform" ratings with a price target of $65.00, underscoring confidence in its future.

articles.title: How TE Connectivity’s Dividend Hike and AI-Focused Downgrade Will Impact TE Connectivity (TEL) Investors
articles.summary: TE Connectivity recently declared a quarterly dividend of US$0.7800 per share, reinforcing its focus on shareholder returns. However, an analyst downgrade from Evercore ISI questioned if the company's AI data center and acquisition-driven growth are already fully priced into its valuation. This suggests that while near-term AI data center growth remains a catalyst, valuation sensitivity could pose a short-term risk if growth expectations cool.

articles.title: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) Stock Could Be 13% Undervalued As Pipeline Plans Take Shape
articles.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) is currently deemed 13% undervalued by Simply Wall St, with a fair value of $62.96 compared to its recent close of $54.70. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $0.63 per share, and its robust late-stage pipeline and strategic partnerships are expected to drive future growth despite upcoming patent expirations for key drugs. However, the stock faces risks from patent cliffs and pricing pressure in the U.S. market, creating mixed signals regarding its valuation.

articles.title: General Electric (GE) Stock After 333% Three-Year Surge Is It Too Late To Buy?
articles.summary: General Electric (GE) has seen a 333% surge over three years, leading investors to question its current valuation. According to a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and P/E ratio comparison by Simply Wall St, GE appears to be overvalued, with a DCF estimate suggesting the stock is 48.9% above its intrinsic value. However, different narratives, including bull and bear cases, present a fair value range between $350 and $405, indicating varied investor perspectives on its future growth and risks.

articles.title: Merck & Co Inc Stock (MRK) Moved Up by 3.23% on Jun 23: Key Drivers Unveiled
articles.summary: Merck & Co Inc (MRK) saw its stock rise by 3.23% following positive Phase 3 results for its investigational immunology drug, tulisokibart, in ulcerative colitis. This success helps Merck diversify its revenue beyond Keytruda, which faces patent expiration, and analysts project multi-billion dollar annual sales for tulisokibart. Despite some investor caution regarding detailed data, the broader market remains optimistic about Merck's long-term growth pipeline.

articles.title: Verizon Communications Inc Stock (VZ) Moved Up by 3.19% on Jun 23: Key Drivers Unveiled
articles.summary: Verizon Communications Inc (VZ) stock rose by 3.19% on June 23, driven by several key factors. The company's strategic overhaul, including new "Simplicity" wireless plans and Verizon One, aims to reduce subscriber churn and improve customer retention. Additionally, Verizon's repurchase of $1.8 billion in debt has strengthened its capital structure, and its resilient business model with a stable dividend history contributes to investor confidence in a volatile market.

articles.title: CenterPoint Energy shares, analysts see a Buy consensus
articles.summary: CenterPoint Energy is currently experiencing a "Buy" consensus from 13 analysts, with an average target price of $44.38, slightly above its current trading price of $43.49. The analyst breakdown shows a positive outlook, with 23% Strong Buy, 31% Buy, and 46% Hold ratings. The company, which provides electric transmission and natural gas services in various U.S. markets, is seen as having a stable regulated business model by investors.

articles.title: Johnson & Johnson Stock (JNJ) Moved Up by 3.07% on Jun 23: Drivers Behind the Movement
articles.summary: Johnson & Johnson (JNJ) stock rose by 3.07% on June 23, driven by institutional investors seeking defensive exposure and the company's strong earnings and oncology portfolio growth. Despite ongoing antitrust litigation regarding Stelara and talc lawsuits, JNJ's robust product pipeline, strategic investments in its MedTech operations, and strong balance sheet have maintained investor confidence. Analysts have rated JNJ as a Buy, with an average price target of $253.77.

articles.title: RTX Corporation (NYSE: RTX) Edges Out General Dynamics (NYSE: GD) On Growth, Returns And Strategic Investment
articles.summary: RTX Corporation and General Dynamics are major players in the aerospace and defense sector, benefiting from increased global defense budgets. This article compares their performance and strategic investments, highlighting RTX's stronger growth expectations, impressive earnings surprise history, and superior stock price performance. Despite both carrying a "Hold" rating, RTX appears to be the more attractive investment due to its robust outlook and recent capital commitments.

articles.title: Analog Devices Inc Stock (ADI) Moved Down by 9.23% on Jun 23: Drivers Behind the Movement
articles.summary: Analog Devices Inc. (ADI) stock fell by 9.23% on June 23, 2026, due to a broad sell-off in the global semiconductor sector, triggered by SK Hynix's decision to slow high-bandwidth memory expansion and exacerbated by a hawkish Federal Reserve stance on interest rates. Institutional profit-taking after a recent rally, insider stock sales, and cyclical headwinds in the automotive segment also contributed to the decline. Key factors included concerns over AI capital expenditure, higher cost of capital affecting valuations, and specific vulnerabilities in ADI's automotive division.

Preformed Line Products stock hits all-time high at 398.0 USD
articles.summary: Preformed Line Products (PLPC) stock has reached an all-time high of $398.0 USD, reflecting a 159.06% growth over the past year. Despite a high P/E ratio of 57 indicating potential overvaluation, the company has consistently paid dividends for 52 years, demonstrating strong shareholder commitment. Recent strategic moves include a quarterly dividend declaration, the acquisition of a Brazilian manufacturer to expand its grid infrastructure presence, and an analyst downgrade from "buy" to "hold" with an increased price target.

articles.title: Huntington Ingalls highlights ROMULUS and REMUS progress, shares trade firmly on NYSE
articles.summary: Huntington Ingalls, a U.S. defense contractor, is making significant progress in uncrewed maritime systems with its REMUS 130 underwater vehicle and ROMULUS uncrewed surface vessel program. Analysts project a moderate upside for its shares, driven by these operational milestones and consistent support contracts from the U.S. Navy. The company's stock trades firmly on the NYSE, reflecting its stable position in the defense sector.

articles.title: Heitman seizes downtown Oakland office building from KKR, TMG
articles.summary: Heitman Capital Management has seized a 535,000-square-foot office building in downtown Oakland, previously owned by KKR and TMG Partners, after foreclosing on a $239.6 million loan. The building, anchored by Clorox, will continue to be managed by TMG Partners, who plan renovations to attract new tenants. This foreclosure is part of a trend of rising vacancies and plummeting property values in Oakland's office market since the pandemic.

PACCAR cautious on truck demand outlook, shares trade in Nasdaq-100 range
articles.summary: PACCAR Inc. is approaching the North American truck demand outlook with caution, a topic closely watched by investors given the company's place in the Nasdaq-100 index. Analysts are focusing on PACCAR's margin profile and dividend capacity, noting its ability to maintain strong operating margins through cost control and pricing discipline despite moderating order intake in some fleet segments. The company's diversified brands (Kenworth, Peterbilt, DAF) and financial services segment contribute to stable earnings and a history of returning capital to shareholders through dividends and buybacks.

articles.title: Occidental Petroleum consensus firms ahead of August earnings, shares trade near 52 dollars
articles.summary: Occidental Petroleum (OXY) shares are trading around $52 on the NYSE, with its next earnings report scheduled for August 5, 2026. Analysts maintain a stable outlook, with Truist Securities reiterating a Hold rating and a price target of $57, following a stronger-than-expected first quarter. The company, primarily involved in oil and gas exploration and production, has a market capitalization of approximately $51.5 billion and has seen an 18% share performance over the past year despite a recent 11.72% decline over 30 days.

Eversource Energy holds steady in utilities sector, shares trade in a tight NYSE range
articles.summary: Eversource Energy (ES) is trading stably around $71 on the NYSE with a stable share price range, moderate analyst upside, and a solid dividend profile. The company's valuation metrics are consistent with a mature, regulated utility, with a P/E ratio of 14.99. Analysts expect moderate appreciation, with a 30-day price target of $77.56.

articles.title: Colgate-Palmolive holds firm ahead of next earnings, S&P 500 stock in analyst focus
articles.summary: Colgate-Palmolive (US1941621039) is trading steadily on the NYSE as analysts anticipate its next quarterly report. Consensus points to continued organic growth and robust margins, with specific expectations for year-on-year revenue growth and solid earnings per share. The stock closed at $88.83 on June 22, 2026, with current trading indicating a price around $89.78, reflecting its status as a core holding with a P/E ratio around 34.

articles.title: Ether-Linked Nonprofit Cuts Budget 40% In ‘Challenging Era’
articles.summary: Vitalik Buterin, the programmer who helped create underlying technology for Ether, the world’s No. 2 cryptocurrency, said the nonprofit behind it is being forced to make some difficult decisions.

articles.title: Guarantor: JPMorgan Chase & Co.
articles.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering Capped Accelerated Barrier Notes linked to the Dow Jones Industrial Average, fully and unconditionally guaranteed by JPMorgan Chase & Co. These notes are designed for investors seeking positive returns based on the Index's performance, with a maximum return of at least 82.331% at maturity, subject to specific barrier amounts and leverage factors. Investors should be aware of the risks, including the potential loss of principal and credit risks of both JPMorgan Financial and JPMorgan Chase & Co.

articles.title: Cedar Realty Trust (CDR) Stock News & Updates
articles.summary: This page provides news and updates concerning Cedar Realty Trust (CDR) stock, focusing on its preferred securities and retail-property portfolio. Key announcements include dividend declarations on preferred stock, tax information for distributions, and details surrounding its merger with Wheeler Real Estate Investment Trust, which resulted in Cedar Realty Trust becoming a wholly owned subsidiary. The company, a Maryland corporation taxed as a real estate investment trust, primarily owns and operates grocery-anchored shopping centers.

articles.title: Why Century Aluminum (CENX) Is Down 9.2% After Insider Selling And Valuation Concerns
articles.summary: Century Aluminum (CENX) shares dropped 9.2% due to mounting valuation concerns and insider selling, with approximately US$800,000 worth of shares sold by insiders and no reported purchases. The company's stock is trading above some intrinsic value estimates, compounded by a reduction in institutional ownership and limited transparency on cash flow. This raises questions about the long-term confidence in the company's current pricing despite its U.S. expansion plans.

articles.title: Heavy Transportation Equipment Stocks Q1 Highlights: Cummins (NYSE:CMI)
articles.summary: The article highlights Q1 earnings for several heavy transportation equipment companies, focusing on Cummins (NYSE:CMI), Douglas Dynamics (NYSE:PLOW), Greenbrier (NYSE:GBX), Allison Transmission (NYSE:ALSN), and Trinity (NYSE:TRN). It discusses their revenue performance against analysts' expectations, stock movements post-earnings, and broader industry trends including investments in automation, electric vehicles, and the impact of economic cycles.

articles.title: News | Georgia's largest private landowner to move headquarters from Florida to Atlanta
articles.summary: Rayonier, Georgia's largest private landowner and a forestry company, is relocating its headquarters from Jacksonville, Florida, to Atlanta. This move follows its merger with PotlatchDeltic. The company has selected Terminus 100 in Atlanta's Buckhead district for its new office.

articles.title: Cummins Stock Adds Horsepower, Not Ballast
articles.summary: Cummins (CMI) has reached new 52-week highs, driven by a 2-gigawatt power supply agreement with Circe Energy for an AI data center, positioning it as a utility-scale power provider. While the stock shows a high correlation with the S&P 500, it historically captures significantly more upside than downside. The company faces a key risk with a major product transition for new EPA regulations in 2027.

articles.title: AMETEK updates fair value outlook, analysts keep shares in positive focus
articles.summary: AMETEK Inc. has recently updated its fair value outlook, revealing a "modest undervaluation" compared to analyst targets. This positive reevaluation follows the company's record-breaking first-quarter results for 2026 and an upward revision of its full-year guidance. Analysts have increased their average price targets for AMETEK shares, driven by improved revenue growth expectations and profit margin assumptions.

articles.summary: Shares of Edgewell Personal Care Co., which makes Schick razors, rose nearly 18% in New York on Tuesday after the company rejected an unsolicited takeover offer from private equity firm Yellow Wood Partners.
